pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty— 1.1052 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines Triton/CUTLASS-fused MLP kernels, Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 quant to unlock a 3.5× MLP, and GPU causal n-gram tilt plus Brotli.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernel with precomputed act grad
Hessian-ranked mixed int5/int6 quant enabling wider 3.5× MLP capacity
GPU-side causal n-gram tilt/subword certainty acting as sparse auxiliary memory
